_comment: Template. Copy to scripts/release.secrets.json (gitignored) and fill in. The Bunny storage 'key' is the STORAGE ZONE PASSWORD (Bunny → Storage → your zone → FTP & API Access → Password), which is WRITE access to the release CDN — keep it off GitHub.

sermonindex1.key: <sermonindex1 storage-zone password (legacy — only for the migration mirror)>

signing.password: <your Tauri signing key password, or leave "" if none>

bunnyApiKey: <optional: your Bunny ACCOUNT API key to auto-purge the CDN; leave "" to purge manually>
